heading: Redetermination of demountable housing as temporary or permanent
label: 1583 Redetermination of demountable housing as temporary or permanent
text: With respect to any housing classified, prior to , by the Secretary of Housing and Urban Development as demountable, the Secretary of Housing and Urban Development shall, as soon as practicable but not later in any event than , and after consultation with the communities affected, redetermine (taking into consideration local standards and conditions) whether such housing is of a temporary or permanent character, and after such redetermination shall dispose of such housing in accordance with the provisions of this subchapter.April 20, 1950December 31, 1950
notes: Transfer of FunctionsFor transfer of functions to Secretary of Housing and Urban Development, see note set out under .section 1581 of this title
